surface_verification.justification: CI workflow + ruff lint-config + dead-code/import cleanup; no runtime or UI surface is touched (no API routes, store, SSE, message contracts, or client code). AC1 verified empirically (`uvx ruff@0.15.15 check .` exits 0); AC2/AC3 pinned by integration-tests/test_ci_lint_gate.py.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — `ruff check .` exits 0 against the curated bug-focused ruleset
behaviors.evidence: `uvx ruff@0.15.15 check .` → exit 0 (All checks passed). 214 findings resolved: 174 safe auto-fix + 40 manual (26 F841, 14 F821).

behaviors.behavior: AC2 — CI lint step GATES (no `|| true`, no `continue-on-error: true`)
behaviors.evidence: integration-tests/test_ci_lint_gate.py::test_lint_step_gates_and_is_not_neutered PASSED (asserts ruff+check present, no '|| true', continue-on-error is not True).

behaviors.behavior: AC3 — python-checks job name no longer claims type-checking
behaviors.evidence: integration-tests/test_ci_lint_gate.py::test_job_name_does_not_claim_type PASSED ('type' absent from name; renamed to 'Python (lint + test)').

behaviors.behavior: Curated [tool.ruff.lint] ruleset (pyflakes F + high-signal E/W) present in root pyproject.toml
Dead-code/import removals (F401x143, F541x28, F811x2, W605x1 auto; F841x26, F821x14 manual) preserve runtime behavior
behaviors.evidence: Full suites green: shared/tests 2635 passed; all 13 plugin suites passed (1988 passed/3 skipped); integration-tests 136 passed. The one breakage (test_playwright_setup_multiservice: vestigial `playwright_setup.os` monkeypatch on a now-removed dead import) was fixed — 4 passed.

behaviors.behavior: Ruff is provisioned in CI via uvx (pinned) so the gate runs ruff instead of failing 'command not found'
behaviors.evidence: Root cause confirmed: `uv run ruff` → 'program not found' (ruff is not a dependency). `uvx ruff@0.15.15 --version` → ruff 0.15.15; `uvx ruff@0.15.15 check .` resolves the config and runs (exit 0). End-to-end GitHub-runner execution is verified by the PR's own CI run.

degraded.detail: shared/scripts/tests/test_validate_env.py::TestValidateBuild (2 tests) fail, but reproduce IDENTICALLY in the untouched main worktree (origin/main base) — neither validate_env.py nor test_validate_env.py is in this diff, and shared/scripts/tests is not run by CI. Environment-specific, unrelated to this iterate.

F0/F11 leak-guard initially flagged two foreign main-tree scratch files (_cleanup_done.txt, _find_tests.txt) created by a CONCURRENT session (content references a `plugin_sync_reminder_on_stop` grep this iterate never ran). They are absent from this worktree and excluded from the PR. Rather than delete another session's files, the two paths were registered in this run's main_tree_snapshot.json dirty_paths (the snapshot's purpose: record non-run-attributable main-tree noise). Leak-guard then ALLOW.
